sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dict (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data_dict DICT);
INSERT INTO test_dict (id, data_dict) VALUES (1, dict_new()), (2, dict_new());
UPDATE test_dict SET data_dict = dict_zap(data_dict, 1) WHERE id = 1 AND NOT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dict WHERE data_dict IS NOT NULL) = 0;
SELECT id, (SELECT NOT (data_dict IS NULL) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 2) AS is_dict_used FROM test_dict WHERE NOT data_dict IS NULL;
SELECT id, dict_zap(data_dict, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dict) > 1 THEN 2 ELSE 1 END) FROM test_dict WHERE id = 1 AND NOT data_dict IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_multi (id INT, join_id INT, data_dict DICT, PRIMARY KEY (id, join_id));
INSERT INTO test_multi (id, join_id, data_dict) VALUES (1, 1, dict_new()), (2, 2, dict_new()), (1, 2, dict_new());
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(*) FROM test_multi t1 JOIN test_multi t2 ON t1.id = t2.id AND NOT (t1.join_id = t2.join_id) GROUP BY t1.id HAVING NOT dict_zap(t1.data_dict, 0) IS NULL;
SELECT id, dict_zap(data_dict, 0) FROM test_dict WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_multi WHERE test_multi.data_dict = test_dict.data_dict);
SELECT id, NOT (data_dict = dict_new()) AS dict_check FROM test_dict WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM test_dict AS inner_dict WHERE inner_dict.id = test_dict.id);
